---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement (not rebalancing strategy specific)
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

**Summary:**  
<!-- One-sentence description of the feature -->

**Problem Statement:**  
<!-- What user need or pain point does this address? -->

**Proposed Solution:**  
<!-- Describe your proposed solution in detail -->

## Use Cases

**Primary Use Case:**  
<!-- Main scenario where this feature would be used -->

**Example Workflow:**  
1. <!-- User does X -->
2. <!-- System responds with Y -->
3. <!-- User achieves Z -->

**Target Users:**  
<!-- Who would use this feature? All users / Portfolio managers / Admins / etc. -->

## Expected Behavior

**User Interface:**  
<!-- If applicable, describe UI changes or new screens -->

**API Changes:**  
<!-- If applicable, describe new endpoints or parameter changes -->

**Configuration:**  
<!-- What settings or options should be available? -->

## Technical Considerations

**Component:**  
<!-- Which parts of the system are affected? Frontend / Backend / Contract / All -->

**Dependencies:**  
<!-- Does this require external services, libraries, or blockchain features? -->

**Performance Impact:**  
<!-- Could this affect system performance or scalability? -->

**Security Implications:**  
<!-- Are there any security considerations? -->

**Breaking Changes:**  
<!-- Would this break existing functionality or APIs? Yes / No -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why is this approach preferred? -->

## Success Metrics

<!-- How would we measure if this feature is successful? -->

- <!-- Metric 1: e.g., "Reduces rebalance execution time by 20%" -->
- <!-- Metric 2: e.g., "Increases user engagement with portfolio analytics" -->

## Additional Context

**References:**  
<!-- Links to similar features in other platforms, research, or discussions -->

**Mockups/Diagrams:**  
<!-- If applicable, add visual mockups or architecture diagrams -->

**Priority:**  
<!-- From your perspective: Critical / High / Medium / Low / Nice-to-have -->

---

## Maintainer Checklist

<!-- For maintainers reviewing this request -->

- [ ] Feature aligns with project roadmap and goals
- [ ] Use cases are clear and well-defined
- [ ] Technical approach is feasible
- [ ] No major security or performance concerns
- [ ] Breaking changes are justified and documented
- [ ] Success metrics are measurable
